summary: Implemented the receipt copy action (US-016). Created `src/ui/clipboard.ts` with feature-detected Clipboard API wrapper, `src/modules/fingerprint/format-receipt-text.ts` for plain-text receipt serialization, and `src/ui/copy-button.ts` as a button factory with success/unavailable feedback states and auto-revert. Added CSS styles for `.receipt-copy-btn--success` and `.receipt-copy-btn--unavailable` with reduced-motion support. Integrated the copy button into the fingerprint receipt actions container. All 717 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean.
